## Get project root

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### get_project_root

>  get_project_root ()

*Get the project root directory from either notebook or module context*

#### Example usage

``` python
get_project_root()
```

    Path('/home/jelle/code/hopsa')

## Get project name

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### get_project_name

>  get_project_name ()

#### Example usage

``` python
get_project_name()
```

    'hopsa'
